metadata.description: Marketing plugins by Indranil Banerjee (https://indranil.in) installable on **5 coding-agent surfaces** from a single source repository: Claude Code + Anthropic Cowork (canonical), OpenAI Codex (`.codex-plugin/plugin.json`), Cursor (`.cursor-plugin/plugin.json`), GitHub Copilot CLI (auto-discovers `.claude-plugin/plugin.json` — no new manifest needed), and Google Antigravity 2.0 CLI (experimental `.antigravity/plugin.json`). All three plugins share a single `skills/` directory across platforms (Agent Skills are an open standard adopted by all 5 surfaces). All plugins ship zero global hooks and zero auto-connecting MCPs for clean multi-plugin coexistence; comply with the Anthropic Software Directory Policy; HTTP MCP connectors are Cowork-compatible. EU AI Act Article 50 ready across all three plugins (C2PA content provenance signing). Full community standards: each plugin ships CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md, SECURITY.md (private vulnerability reporting via GitHub Private Security Advisories), Issue + PR templates, MIT-licensed. Shared model curator (`scripts/model_registry.json` + `resolve_model.py`) — single source of truth for every model id used by the plugins' scripts, with deprecated-id auto-fall-forward and a `refresh_models.py` drift report against live provider catalogs. Slash command syntax is canonical /<plugin-name>:<command> per Claude Code's auto-namespacing; on Codex/Cursor/Copilot/Antigravity, the same workflows invoke via natural-language intent through SKILL.md auto-discovery.

plugins.name: digital-marketing-pro
plugins.description: v3.7.5 ships 3 new skills closing the v3.7.4 audit gaps: /validate-profile (brand profile + connector health check, no credential exposure), /campaign-audit (cross-channel current-state inventory + 4-tier triage), /launch-campaign (multi-channel 14-step launch orchestrator with checkpointed activation). The most comprehensive open-source AI marketing plugin — 153 skills, 25 specialist agents, 12-Part Strategy Flow producing the Four Core Documents (61 explicit steps), Two-Views Model, Decision Matrix, Living Project Instruction File. Built for marketing agencies, in-house teams running 50–200 brands, and consultancies. Installs on **5 coding-agent surfaces** — Claude Code + Cowork (canonical), OpenAI Codex, Cursor, GitHub Copilot CLI (auto-discovers `.claude-plugin/plugin.json`), and Google Antigravity 2.0 (experimental). EU AI Act Article 50 ready (C2PA content provenance signing end-to-end tested against c2pa-python 0.32, pre-publish gate blocks unsigned AI assets for EU campaigns, draft implementing guidelines from 8 May 2026 baked into compliance rules). 6-platform AEO/GEO audit including Google AI Mode (Gemini 3.5 Flash, ~1B MAUs, default conversational search since Google I/O 2026). 16 privacy-law jurisdictions (GDPR, CCPA, EU AI Act, DPDPA, LGPD, CASL, PIPEDA, UK GDPR + 8 more). 14 HTTP MCP connectors (Slack, HubSpot, Notion, Stripe, Gmail, Google Calendar, Ahrefs, SimilarWeb, Klaviyo, Amplitude, Canva, Figma, Asana, Webflow). 77 Python scripts (optional). 167 reference knowledge files. 14 top-level slash commands. v3.7.10 introduced a connector-aware action resolver that probes live .mcp.json + env-var state and resolves each of 14 campaign-audit / launch-campaign actions into one of three modes (real / manifest_ready / stub_unconfigured). v3.7.11 closes the loop with scripts/connector_executor.py — a stdlib urllib HTTP executor that actually fires the manifest against the real API for 8 verified connectors (Slack, HubSpot, Klaviyo, SendGrid, Brevo, Customer.io, Mailchimp, Ahrefs) with credential substitution, write-op --confirm gate, audit logging, and per-endpoint success-code handling. 25 OAuth-only connectors return execute_blocked_reason='use MCP path' with the manifest still returned. /digital-marketing-pro:doctor shows readiness; /digital-marketing-pro:execute-action fires individual actions. Test harnesses: 27 resolver scenarios + 17 mock-HTTP-server executor tests, all 44 pass. Every executable endpoint cited to current vendor docs. v3.7.1 polish + discoverability pass with rewritten README and corrected asset counts. v3.7 added Copilot CLI + experimental Antigravity install surfaces. v3.6 added Codex + Cursor manifests. v3.5 May-2026-ecosystem refresh (AI Mode + Core Update + Article 50 draft + Meta Advantage+ Leads/Threads + Gemini Omni/Nano Banana Pro/Veo 3.1 + Claude Code v2.1.149+ /usage). MIT-licensed, free, no telemetry. Built and maintained by Indranil Banerjee (https://indranil.in). Part of the Neelverse Marketing Suite alongside ContentForge and SocialForge. Shared model curator (scripts/model_registry.json + resolve_model.py + refresh_models.py): single source of truth for every AI model id used by the plugin, with deprecated-id auto-fall-forward and a refresh_models.py drift report against live provider catalogs (Anthropic / OpenAI / Google). See docs/MODEL-CURATOR.md.

plugins.name: contentforge
plugins.description: v3.12.3 fixes two production bugs: (1) dual-copy save — finished .docx now also written to user-visible ~/Documents/ContentForge/<brand>/<type>/<YYYY-MM>/ alongside the internal tracking copy, fixing the 'file isn't saving on local drive' report; (2) per-phase checkpointing via scripts/checkpoint-manager.py + new /contentforge:resume command — interrupted pipeline runs resume from the last completed phase instead of restarting from Phase 1. Also new: /contentforge:output-folder command to reveal the visible output folder in the OS file manager. Open-source enterprise content production pipeline — 19 skills, 13 specialist agents, 11 quality gates, 29-pattern AI-detection humanizer, fact-checker subagent, three-category internal linking (topical / commercial / authority), real .docx output with embedded SEO + Quality + Production + Internal-Link appendices. **EU AI Act Article 50 ready** — C2PA content provenance signing for the .docx output (applicable 2 Aug 2026) via --c2pa-sign on scripts/generate-docx.py with .docx-embed-if-supported + verifiable .c2pa.json sidecar fallback. Installs on **5 coding-agent surfaces**: Claude Code + Cowork (canonical), OpenAI Codex, Cursor, GitHub Copilot CLI (auto-discovers .claude-plugin/plugin.json), Google Antigravity 2.0 (experimental). Single skills/ directory shared across all platforms. **v3.12.1** adds Star History, community-standards files (CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md, SECURITY.md, PR + Issue templates), and rewrites the README for organic discoverability with social-proof badges + maintainer block (linkedin.com/in/askneelnow + x.com/askneelnow). **v3.12.0** added Copilot CLI + experimental Antigravity install surfaces. **v3.11.0** added Codex + Cursor manifests. **v3.10.0** added the C2PA .docx signing. v3.9.6 reflected Google's March 2026 core update demoting FAQ/HowTo/Review schema. v3.9 humanizer with 29-pattern AI-detection catalog. Multi-plugin coexistence: zero global hooks, zero auto-connecting MCPs (16 opt-in HTTP MCP connectors catalogued in .mcp.json.connectors-reference). MIT-licensed, free, no telemetry. Built and maintained by Indranil Banerjee (https://indranil.in). Part of the Neelverse Marketing Suite alongside Digital Marketing Pro and SocialForge. Shared model curator (scripts/model_registry.json + resolve_model.py): aliases like latest-balanced-anthropic / latest-vision-google resolve to concrete ids at call time; deprecated ids auto-fall-forward. See docs/MODEL-CURATOR.md.

plugins.name: socialforge
plugins.description: Open-source agency-grade social media production engine — calendar parsing, asset-first compositing (brand assets are sacred, AI is the creative layer around them), AI image generation (Vertex AI Nano Banana Pro), AI video generation (WaveSpeed Kling v3.0 Pro), multi-platform copy adaptation (Instagram, TikTok, LinkedIn, Threads, X, Facebook, YouTube Shorts), human-in-the-loop review galleries, and C2PA content provenance signing for EU AI Act Article 50 compliance (applicable 2 Aug 2026). **16 skills, 25 commands, 5 agents, 22 scripts, 10 HTTP MCP connectors, 0 global hooks.** Four creative modes (ANCHOR_COMPOSE / ENHANCE_EXTEND / STYLE_REFERENCED / PURE_CREATIVE). Installs on **5 coding-agent surfaces**: Claude Code + Cowork (canonical), OpenAI Codex, Cursor, GitHub Copilot CLI (auto-discovers .claude-plugin/plugin.json), Google Antigravity 2.0 (experimental). Single skills/ directory shared across all platforms. **v1.8.1** adds Star History, community-standards files (CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md, SECURITY.md, PR + Issue templates), and rewrites the README with social-proof badges + maintainer block (linkedin.com/in/askneelnow + x.com/askneelnow); fixes stale asset counts (15→16 skills, 19→22 scripts). **v1.8.0** added Copilot CLI + experimental Antigravity install surfaces. **v1.7.0** added Codex + Cursor manifests. **v1.6.0** added end-to-end-tested C2PA content provenance signing (75-byte test PNG → ~43 KB signed PNG with manifest_embedded_and_verified=true). May 2026 channel pack: TikTok USDS post-Jan 2026, LinkedIn March 2026 algorithm + Depth Score, Apple MPP, YouTube AI labeling, Sora deprecation → defaults to Runway Gen-4 / Veo 3.x / Kling 3.0. All 10 HTTP MCP connectors are Cowork-compatible. MIT-licensed, free, no telemetry. Built and maintained by Indranil Banerjee (https://indranil.in). Part of the Neelverse Marketing Suite alongside Digital Marketing Pro and ContentForge. Shared model curator (scripts/model_registry.json + resolve_model.py): image / video / vision model ids resolved via aliases (latest-image-google, latest-image-edit-google, latest-vision-google, latest-video-wavespeed, latest-video-google); deprecated ids auto-fall-forward; --model and --video-model flags accept any registered id. See docs/MODEL-CURATOR.md.
